name: 3Rd District Highway
description_short: Banks America is a routing number and financial institution directory, not a credit union. It provides free lookup tools for bank routing numbers, SWIFT codes, and branch locations across U.S. banks and credit unions.
description_long: Banks America operates as an informational directory and reference website for U.S. financial institutions rather than as a financial services provider itself. The site was apparently misclassified as a credit union when it actually functions as a public database and educational resource. The website provides comprehensive lookup capabilities for routing numbers (ACH and Fedwire), SWIFT codes, and branch location information across hundreds of banks and credit unions in the United States. Users can search for routing numbers belonging to major banks like JPMorgan Chase, Bank of America, Wells Fargo, and regional institutions, as well as credit unions such as Navy Federal, Pentagon Federal, and others. The platform explains the different types of routing numbers—ACH routing numbers for electronic transactions and Fedwire routing numbers for wire transfers—and provides educational content about how routing numbers work and their purpose in the financial system. Banks America distinguishes itself by aggregating data across both traditional banks and credit unions in one searchable directory, making it a centralized reference tool rather than offering transactional financial services. The honest assessment is that this is a directory service only, not a financial institution itself, and should not be listed as a credit union or any financial services provider category. It serves primarily as a free informational resource for consumers and businesses needing to locate routing numbers and branch information.
services: Routing number lookup for U.S. banks
Routing number lookup for U.S. credit unions
ACH routing number information and search
Fedwire routing number information and search
SWIFT code lookup for international transfers
Educational content on routing number types and usage
Searchable database of major U.S. financial institutions
Check digit explanation and routing number structure information
pros: Free access to comprehensive routing number database for hundreds of U.S. banks and credit unions
Educational content explaining ACH routing numbers, Fedwire transfers, and how routing numbers work
Searchable directory covering both traditional banks and credit unions in one location
Information on branch locations and addresses for major U.S. financial institutions
SWIFT code lookup capability for international wire transfers
No registration or login required to search routing numbers
Coverage of regional and national financial institutions
cons: Miscategorized as a credit union when it is actually an informational directory with no financial services
Does not offer any actual banking, credit union, or financial products or services
No ability to open accounts, transfer funds, or conduct any transactions through the platform
Purely a reference tool with no customer support or account management capabilities
best_for: Consumers looking up routing numbers for domestic ACH transfers and direct deposits
Businesses needing to verify bank routing numbers for payroll or payment processing
Individuals researching SWIFT codes for international wire transfers
Anyone needing to locate branch addresses or contact information for specific financial institutions
diagnosis: Banks America is not a financial services provider or credit union—it is a free informational directory for looking up routing numbers and branch locations. This company is completely miscategorized and should be removed from any financial services database, as it offers no actual financial products, accounts, lending, or transactional services of any kind.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_description: 3rd District Highway — NCUA-insured credit union in Lafayette, LA. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
